creator: ecrist@secure-computing.net
text:
On Jan 19, 2009, at 3:00 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of security/ssl-admin,
>
> Please note that PR ports/130754 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.


This patch is approved. I submitted it. ;)

Thanks.

---
Eric Crist
